examples.title: Algorithm: Modifying a String
examples.description: Demonstrates how to modify a string by concatenating two strings
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ModifyString
INPUT: str1, str2
OUTPUT: result

BEGIN
 result = str1 + " " + str2
 RETURN result
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode takes two input strings, concatenates them with a space in between, and returns the result.

examples.title: Java: Modifying a String
examples.description: Demonstrates how to modify a string by concatenating two strings in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code takes two input strings, concatenates them with a space in between, and prints the result.
